channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump ‘cancels’ negotiators' trip to Pakistan: Fox News
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump cancels Pakistan talks trip, says Iran war on hold
- Iran Offered Better Deal ‘10 Minutes’ After US Canceled Pakistan Meeting, Trump Says
- Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
- Will US Iran war begin again? Trump comments, Iran diplomacy steps, and Pakistan talks explained
- Trump cancels envoys’ trip to Pakistan for Iran talks
- Trump Cancels Iran Peace Talks at Last Minute: 'We Have All the Cards'
- Trump cancels trip by US negotiators for peace talks with Iran
- Iran diplomat leaves Islamabad, Trump cancels US delegation trip
- Who is in-charge in Iran, and will Trump get any call from Tehran? Talks collapse after cancelled Islamabad visit
- Aborted Pakistan Trip Leaves Trump With Tough Choices on Iran Talks
- Trump says he called off dispatching envoys to Iran talks
- Trump claims Iran made fresh offers shortly after cancelling US talks trip
- Iran war: Trump cancels envoys' trip to Islamabad
- Trump cancels US envoys’ trip after Iran’s Araghchi leaves Pakistan
- Trump says cancelled envoys' Pakistan trip, but Iran war not resuming
- Trump cancels Witkoff, Kushner Pakistan trip for Iran talks
- Trump cancels envoys' Pakistan trip, in blow to hopes for Iran war breakthrough
- Trump Cancels Aides’ Trip for Iran Talks, Saying, ‘We Have All the Cards.’
- Trump cancels Witkoff, Kushner’s trip to Pakistan for talks with Iran
- Trump cancels envoys’ trip to Pakistan for peace talks
- Trump cancels trip by US negotiators for peace talks with Iran
- Trump cancels his envoys’ Pakistan trip for Iran ceasefire negotiations
- Trump cancels envoys' trip to Islamabad
- Trump says he cancelled US negotiators' trip to Pakistan for Iran talks, Fox News reports
- Trump says canceling envoys' trip does not mean restart of Iran war
- Trump cancels envoy visit to Pakistan, says Iran can ‘call us’ to negotiate
- Donald Trump has canceled his envoys' trip to Islamabad for talks with Iran
- Trump Cancels Aides’ Trip for Iran Talks, Saying, ‘We Have All the Cards.’
- Iran-US latest update: War to erupt again? Donald Trump says he canceled envoys trip to Pakistan talks, Tehran rejects Washington demands
- Trump says he's no longer sending Witkoff and Kushner to Pakistan for Iran talks
- Trump Cancels Witkoff and Kushner's Trip to Pakistan for Talks With Iran
- Trump scraps latest peace talks after Iranian officials depart Pakistan
- Trump says he canceled US negotiators' trip to Pakistan for Iran talks, Fox News reports
- Trump sends envoys to Islamabad as Iran rules out direct talks
- Iran news LIVE updates: Tehran says no direct talks with US planned; Trump sends envoys Witkoff and Kushner to Pakistan]]>

- Polls open in Gaza area in first municipal election in 20 years
- West Bank and part of Gaza vote in first municipal elections since war
- Palestinians cast ballots in first elections since Gaza war
- Polls open in Gaza area in first municipal election in 20 years
- Palestinians vote in first elections since Israel's invasion of Gaza
- Palestinian local elections give some Gazans a chance to vote for the first time in years
- Voting underway in West Bank, parts of Gaza
- Palestinian local elections give some Gazans a chance to vote for the first time in years
- Palestinian local elections give some Gazans a chance to vote for the first time in years
- Palestinian local elections give some Gazans a chance to vote for the first time in years
- Palestinian local elections give some Gazans a chance to vote for the first time in years

item.title: Iran says no to direct talks as US negotiators set for Islamabad visit
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran-US 2nd phase talks stall
- Direct US-Iran talks in Islamabad to be held on April 27 — Axios reporter
- Iran’s authorities project hardened stance with more talks on horizon
- ‘There won’t be any…: Uncertainty clouds Iran-US talks yet again despite White House confirmation
- Iran unsure if US ready for dialogue — foreign minister
- US-Iran talks unlikely to reach breakthrough, Republican Party lawmaker says
- Roundup: Iran says no direct talks with U.S. as both sides head to Pakistan
- US negotiators to go to Islamabad, but Iran says no direct talks
- US negotiators to go to Islamabad, but Iran says no direct talks
- No clarity on U.S.-Iran talks as Islamabad stays under lockdown
- U.S. negotiators to go to Islamabad, but Iran says no direct talks
- Uncertainty over US-Iran talks keeps Islamabad locked down
- No clarity on US-Iran talks as Islamabad stays under lockdown
- US negotiators to go to Islamabad, but Iran says no direct talks
- Iran’s Leadership Divisions Frustrate Efforts to Make Progress in Talks
- US hopes for progress, but Iran says not direct talks
- US says Iran open to talks, Tehran denies meeting plans
- Watch: Iran says no direct talks with U.S. in Islamabad planned
- White House claims ‘Iran wants in-person talks’ in Pakistan, Tehran rejects direct discussions
- Israel-Iran war LIVE: Iran says no direct talks with U.S. in Islamabad planned
- No Iran-US talks planned during Araghchi's Pakistan visit, Iranian Foreign Ministry says]]>

- Mali junta battles ‘terrorist groups’ amid intense fighting
- Militants and separatists launch coordinated attacks across Mali
- Militants launch coordinated attacks across Mali
- Insurgents attack military bases across Mali, closing main airport
- Armed groups in Mali attack capital in possible coordinated effort, army says
- Gunfire and blasts rock Mali as attackers hit capital and other cities, residents say
- ‘Scale and coordination of Mali attacks appear unprecedented’
- Mali junta reports ‘terrorist’ attacks on several targets
- Mali army says situation under control after terrorist groups launch attacks in several cities
- Mali junta battles ‘terrorist groups’ amid intense fighting
- Gunmen stage simultaneous attacks across Mali, army says
- Armed groups stage simultaneous attacks across Mali
- Gunfire, blasts rock Mali as attackers hit capital and other cities, residents say
- Gunfire In Mali As Army Battles 'Terrorist Groups'
- Mali attacks live: Gunfire heard near Bamako airport and in several cities
- Mali army says armed groups launch coordinated attacks across country
- Gunfire and blasts rock Mali as attackers hit capital and other cities, residents say
- Mali army says armed groups launch nationwide attacks; gunfire near airport
